title: Payment timeout during card authorization
summary: Checkout requests failed because payment-service retried a slow ledger dependency until the gateway timed out.
root_cause: A latency spike in ledger-service exhausted the payment-service retry budget and caused upstream checkout failures.
fix: Scale ledger-service consumers and review slow queries.

title: Inventory stale reads after deploy
summary: inventory-service served stale stock data after a cache invalidation regression.
root_cause: A deploy removed a cache invalidation call, so inventory-service returned stale quantities until TTL expiry.
fix: Restore cache invalidation on stock update.
Add regression tests around stock mutations.

title: API gateway auth fan-out failure
summary: api-gateway propagated auth-service failures to multiple user-facing routes.
root_cause: auth-service returned intermittent token validation errors, which caused api-gateway request fan-out failures.
fix: Roll back the auth-service config change.
Add a fallback token validation path.
Increase alerting on gateway-auth dependency health.
